text.text: The most held massage experience I’ve ever had. Lynn is incredibly intuitive and caring and holds space so calmly and gently. The massage made me think about parts of my body I’d never thought about and I came out feeling brand new. Go go go! Thank you Lynn I’ll be back! 🙏🏻💛🌞

originalText.text: The most held massage experience I’ve ever had. Lynn is incredibly intuitive and caring and holds space so calmly and gently. The massage made me think about parts of my body I’d never thought about and I came out feeling brand new. Go go go! Thank you Lynn I’ll be back! 🙏🏻💛🌞

text.text: Lynn is absolutely amazing. She’s so intuitive and communicative in the best ways. I’ve been getting massages for the past couple of decades, but have never had a masseuse fine tune along the way as Lynn does. Perfect balance of relaxation and deep tissue reset. Thank you!

originalText.text: Lynn is absolutely amazing. She’s so intuitive and communicative in the best ways. I’ve been getting massages for the past couple of decades, but have never had a masseuse fine tune along the way as Lynn does. Perfect balance of relaxation and deep tissue reset. Thank you!

text.text:
Lynn is amazing. She has such a lovely way about her and really knows what she’s doing. Whether you want a relaxing massage or something to properly work into tension and pain, she just seems to know exactly what your body needs.

I’ve had ongoing issues with my left shoulder for quite a while now, and for the first time in a long time I actually felt real relief after seeing her.

The space is bright and airy and feels really calm, I can imagine it being especially nice for a summer treatment.

I was recommended to her by a mutual acquaintance and I’ll 100% be back. There’s something about her approach that’s just different from any massage I’ve had before. Thanks Lynn.

text.text: I had the most incredible deep tissue massage with Lynn and I thoroughly recommend. From the moment I walked into the beautiful space I felt relaxed. Lynn is incredibly attentive and I felt this throughout the entire experience, tailoring the massage for my bodies needs and wants.  Couldn't recommend Lynn more highly. I'm booked in again!

Lynn is incredibly attentive and I felt this throughout the entire experience, tailoring the massage for my bodies needs and wants.  Couldn't recommend Lynn more highly. I'm booked in again!

text.text: Lynn is incredible. She understands how to make the therapeutic experience exactly that. We chatted before and she asked lots of questions to understand what I was looking for and what I was comfortable with. I really was blown away by the attention and care she paid. I will 100% be visiting again. Thank you so much!
